title: Exposure: CMOS
description: This community addon adds general computerization to Exposure
body:
# Exposure: CMOS
is a community made addon for [Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure) that adds compat with [CC: Tweaked](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-tweaked) in multiple forms.

For more detailed information, see the GitHub Wiki.

## Digitizer
Allows reading of pictures from computers

## Camera Stand
Allows control of a camera stand and the attached camera.
Potential as a HID, due to the yaw/pitch events emitted.

## Wireless Receiver
Automagically receives image data from the star of the show...

## The CMOS Camera
A film-less camera with a 128x128 sensor, that sends its image data to a linked Wireless Receiver
